#smallbusinesschallenge ??
Believe My Work Not Words !!
Duct cleaning is soooo necessary. What are you breathing???
We are charging a flat price for the whole house Duct Cleaning with Free Camera Inspection.
IF ANY ONE INTERESTED
I guarantee all my work.
First THREE (3) COMMENTERS will get special DISCOUNT
Our service package includes the following:
.Unlimited Vents Cleaning .
·Before after pictures.
·Camera inspection.
·Ac unit checkup.
You must consider duct cleaning if you have
·Residents with allergies and asthma
·Smoker in the household
·Hair and dander from pet
·Done duct cleaning more than a year ago
NOTE (1) : Do not worry about moving your furniture as we are using latest modified equipment like whip snap which can goes inside each and every vent easily.
NOTE (2) : No kind of upfront charges before the service all you have to pay after you are fully satisfied and happy.
NOTE (3) :Its a Messy Process But we use Bags So all the dust will go in to the bags which is Located in the Vehicle.
Thanks. ??
